since_last: 88% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 88% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.71% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 88% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.11%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.11%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +4.48%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +4.48%, CEVA +4.23%, ORCL +4.15%, AVAV +3.64%, LRCX +3.52%. Laggards: PUBM -0.88%, AES -0.82%, DV -0.52%, CRM -0.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.47% at $155.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
